requirements.task_name: Hire the cheapest 2-ton electric chain hoist for 3 days next week with depot pickup
requirements.task_description: Find an electric chain hoist with at least 2-ton capacity, filter for next week’s 3-day hire, sort by daily rate, select the cheapest option, and place it in the cart with depot pickup selected. Success = cart contains exactly 1 electric chain hoist with capacity ≥ 2 tons, a 3-day hire set for next week, and delivery method set to depot pickup.

requirements.task_name: Hire two 1-ton manual chain hoists for the weekend under $60/day with high ratings
requirements.task_description: Locate 1-ton manual chain hoists with a daily rate under $60 and a rating of at least 4 stars, select a weekend hire period (Saturday–Sunday), and add 2 units of the first matching product to the cart with standard delivery. Success = cart contains quantity 2 of a 1-ton manual chain hoist with rating ≥ 4 stars, daily rate ≤ $60, for a Saturday–Sunday hire, with standard delivery selected.

requirements.task_name: Create a hire quote for a 1-ton manual chain hoist and a compatible 2-ton beam trolley for 5 days
requirements.task_description: Add one 1-ton manual chain hoist and one beam trolley rated for 2 tons to a quote, set the same 5-day hire period and site postcode, and submit the quote request. Success = a quote request is submitted containing exactly two items (1-ton manual chain hoist and 2-ton beam trolley) with identical 5-day hire dates and postcode 10001.

requirements.task_name: Save the lightest 3-ton electric hoist under $150/day to a favourites list using product comparison
requirements.task_description: Filter for 3-ton electric hoists under $150/day, compare three options, find the lightest one, and save it to a wishlist/favourites list. Success = favourites/wishlist contains at least one 3-ton electric hoist under $150/day that was chosen as the lowest-weight option from a 3-product comparison.

requirements.task_name: Select a scaffold hoist with at least 20 m lift height for a weekend hire and proceed to guest checkout with address entered
requirements.task_description: Find a scaffold hoist with lift height ≥ 20 m, set a weekend-inclusive 3-day hire, add it to the cart, then proceed through guest checkout to the point where contact and address details are entered. Success = checkout flow reached where contact name, email, and full address are filled for a scaffold hoist of ≥ 20 m lift height with a Saturday–Monday 3-day hire.

requirements.task_name: Register an account and save an electric hoist safety guide to saved resources
requirements.task_description: Create a new on-site user account, navigate to the safety guides, search for an electric hoist safety article, and save it to the user’s saved resources list. Success = a logged-in account exists and the saved resources section contains at least one article related to electric hoist safety.

requirements.task_name: Compare three 1.5-ton lever hoists and hire the one with the longest chain length under $75/day
requirements.task_description: Filter for 1.5-ton lever hoists under $75/day, compare three products, pick the one with the longest standard chain length, and add it to the cart for a 3-day hire starting on the first day of next month. Success = cart contains exactly one 1.5-ton lever hoist with daily rate ≤ $75 and the longest chain length among the three compared items, with a 3-day hire starting on the first day of the next month.

requirements.task_name: Hire an outdoor-rated electric hoist with IP65 or higher for 10 days with delivery to postcode 30301
requirements.task_description: Filter for outdoor-rated electric hoists with IP rating ≥ IP65, choose a model, set a 10-day hire starting two weeks from today, add it to the cart, and proceed in checkout with site delivery to postcode 30301 and a note about rooftop installation. Success = checkout flow reached where cart contains one outdoor-rated electric hoist with IP rating ≥ IP65, 10-day hire set, delivery method set to site delivery, postcode 30301 entered, and a rooftop installation note added.
